strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15 years in software engineering, with diverse full-stack experience dating back to 2006.
Demonstrates preferred entrepreneurial experience within technology by founding and developing GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Shows strong internal and external community engagement by organizing technical workshops (Web Internals, TDT 2015) and speaking at conferences (FOSS4G 2019).
concerns: Lacks the recognized, director-level AI expertise required; AI experience is limited to a very recent role at re:cinq working on MCP code generators.
No evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI technology adoption.
Lacks the required strategic product leadership experience to identify the future state of enterprise cloud products at a Principal/Director level.
response.justification: While Bogdan has an impressive 15+ year track record in software engineering and demonstrates excellent entrepreneurial initiative (e.g., founding GISCollective), he does not possess the Director-level AI strategy background required for this role. The position requires recognized expertise in AI product development and the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. Bogdan's AI exposure is limited to his most recent role at re:cinq building developer tooling (MCP), which does not align with the deep AI leadership and executive-level strategic advisory competencies expected of a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy.
